unconfirmed.title: Confirm your email first
unconfirmed.body: We sent a confirmation link to {email}. Click it to activate your account before signing in.

totp.title: Enter verification code
totp.description: Open your authenticator app and enter the 6-digit code.

recovery.title: Use a recovery code
recovery.description: Enter one of the codes you saved when you set up two-factor authentication.

register.title: Create account
register.description: Set up your Modulith workspace access.

closed.title: Registration closed
closed.description: New account registration is not available at this time.
closed.back: Already have an account? Sign in

inviteOnly.title: Invitation required
inviteOnly.description: Registration is currently by invitation only.

checkEmail.title: Check your email
checkEmail.body: We sent a confirmation link to {email}. Click the link in that email to activate your account.

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send a reset link.

sent.title: Check your email
sent.body: We sent a password reset link to {email}. The link expires in 30 minutes.

resetPassword.title: Set new password
resetPassword.description: Choose a new password for your account.
resetPassword.linkError: This reset link is invalid or has expired.

missing.title: Reset link missing
missing.description: Use the password reset link from your email, or request a new one.

toast.title: Password reset
toast.description: You can now sign in with your new password.

goodbye.title: Account deleted
goodbye.description: Your account and all associated data have been permanently removed.
